title: PayloadsAllTheThings: Open URL Redirect
attack_vector:
Open URL Redirect
Un-validated redirects and forwards are possible when a web application accepts untrusted input that could cause the web application to redirect the request to a URL contained within untrusted input. By modifying untrusted URL input to a malicious site, an attacker may successfully launch a phishing scam and steal user credentials. Because the server name in the modified link is identical to the original site, phishing attempts may have a more trustworthy appearance. Un-validat
impact: Attacker could exploit command injection vulnerability
